'''8-LOM''' was a [[LOM-series protocol droid/Legends|LOM-series protocol droid]] found in [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Behind the scenes==
8-LOM was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|Non-Player Character]] (NPC) in the [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.
